name: Harold Bride
role: Junior Wireless Operator, Marconi International Marine Communication Company
publicFace: A cheerful, efficient young man of 22 who has spent the day sending passenger Marconigrams and seems almost unnervingly calm in the crisis
privateGoal: To stay at the key long enough to ensure Carpathia has an accurate course — but also to survive, something he will not admit to his senior operator
fear: That the power will fail before Carpathia confirms her ETA, leaving him with the knowledge that he transmitted into silence
knowledge: He knows the Frankfurt operator initially misidentified the distress signal and wasted six minutes of transmission time
He knows the ship's position as of 11:40 PM was 41°46'N 50°14'W — slightly different from what was transmitted in the first CQD, a discrepancy that could affect Carpathia's intercept course
He knows that Senior Operator Phillips has not eaten since morning and is showing signs of fatigue at the key
voice: Clipped, precise, with occasional dark humor — speaks in operator's shorthand even in conversation
trustLogic: Opens up to anyone who demonstrates technical competence or who brings him factual information he can act on; shuts down in the presence of panic or vagueness
secrets: He copied an ice warning from the Mesaba at 9:40 PM that he never delivered to the bridge — he handed it to Phillips, who set it under a paperweight and forgot it
He has already decided he will not leave the room until Phillips does, a decision he has not shared with anyone

aggressionProfile.mildPressure: Continues tapping the key while answering, barely looking up — answers are accurate but minimal
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: Stops transmitting, turns fully around, speaks with flat precision: 'I need you to tell me something I can use or I need you to leave this room'
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: He will never admit the Mesaba warning was not delivered — he believes it would not have changed the outcome and he cannot afford to believe otherwise
aggressionProfile.fleeCondition: Will not flee until Phillips orders him out or the room begins to flood
aggressionProfile.fleeStyle: Moves quickly and without ceremony, takes nothing except his lifebelt
aggressionProfile.chaseStyle: Does not run — walks with purpose, which in the chaos looks like running
aggressionProfile.capturedBehavior: Answers every question directly and without affect — he has already made his peace
